top_signals.title: Oil Extends Gains After Trump Says Ceasefire With Iran Is Over
top_signals.summary: Oil jumped after US President Donald Trump said the Iran ceasefire was over.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Private equity firm acquires K&L Freight Management
top_signals.summary:
Argosy Private Equity announced that it acquired a controlling interest in third-party logistics provider K&L Freight Management.

The post Private equity firm acquires K&L Freight Management appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Le Pen’s massive double gamble on presidency
top_signals.summary: Strategy might play well with the far-right leader’s core voters, but the French as a whole don’t buy it

top_signals.title: Japan enacts bill to boost settlement on 6 more border islands
top_signals.summary: The revised special measures law calls for promoting tourism on listed islands and requiring prefectural governments to make efforts to address depopulation.
